zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Byron於1429年11月29日出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲時，她的父親Sir Richard Byron25歲，母親Lucy de Ashton25歲。她於1450年與William Bassett在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年9月12日在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Byron was born on 29 November 1429, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Richard Byron, was 25 and her mother, Lucy de Ashton, was 25. She married William Bassett in 1450, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 September 1493, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Byron est née le 29 novembre 1429, à Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Byron, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Ashton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Bassett en 1450, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1493, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Byron am 29. November 1429 in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Byron 25 und ihre Mutter Lucy de Ashton 25. Sie hat 1450 in Staffordshire, England William Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. September 1493 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Blore, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Byronが1429年11月29日にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Byronは25歳，母Lucy de Ashtonは25歳であった。1450年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでWilliam Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年9月12日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Byron(이)가 1429년 11월 29일 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Byron(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy de Ashton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 William Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 9월 12일 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Bassett em 1450, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Byron родилась 29 ноября 1429 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Byron было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Ashton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bassett в 1450 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 сентября 1493 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
